faqs.question: How do I know if I have drain flies in my Great Kills home?
faqs.answer: Drain flies are small, fuzzy-looking flies often found near sinks, showers, and floor drains. You'll typically see them resting on bathroom or kitchen walls near drains, especially in the evening. They're weak fliers and tend to hop or crawl more than fly. If you notice small moth-like insects around drains in your Great Kills property, you likely have a drain fly infestation that needs professional treatment.

faqs.question: What does your drain fly treatment service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection of all drains and potential breeding sites, identification of infestation sources, application of bio-enzymatic treatments to break down organic matter where larvae develop, mechanical cleaning of affected drains, and fogging or targeted spraying for adult flies. We also provide follow-up recommendations to prevent re-infestation and can schedule return visits if needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take to work in Great Kills?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice a significant reduction in drain fly activity within 2-3 days after treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 1-2 weeks as the treatment breaks down breeding materials and remaining larvae mature and die off. Because drain flies have a short life cycle, treating the source of the infestation is crucial. Our technicians will provide guidance on maintaining drains to prevent new infestations in your Great Kills property.

faqs.question: Why does the drain fly treatment cost $350-$550?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies based on the severity of the infestation, the number of drains affected, property size, and accessibility of plumbing fixtures. A single-bathroom apartment will cost toward the lower end, while a multi-bathroom home or commercial property with extensive drain systems will be priced higher. Our quote includes inspection, treatment of all affected drains, products, labor, and our service guarantee, providing complete value for Great Kills property owners.
